name: Re: Zero World Info RPG
description:
Have you ever thought about continuing in the world of Re:Zero? Well, create your own story! Be a Human, a Wizard, a God, an Archbishop, a Hybrid, an Elf, or a Hybrid, have your favorite Divine Protection or Authority! And of course, have fun!

------------------

I developed a deep hatred for Subaru throughout the anime, so I created this bot with the intention of killing him and taking the sodas. But please, have fun! I put most of the anime characters that were on the Wiki and did my best. Thank ou.

------------------

List of characters:

-Rem

-Ram

-Emilia

-Beatrice

-Subaru

-Pandora
